entries.name: script-parity-validator

frontmatter.name: script-parity-validator

entries.name: skill-script-alignment

frontmatter.name: skill-script-alignment

entries.name: template-sync-validator
entries.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Validates that setup/templates/ and setup/copilot-templates/ are synchronized with .claude/commands/. Respects the copilot frontmatter field in skills/*/SKILL.md to determine expected coverage.

frontmatter.name: template-sync-validator
